description: Create 8 new practical software engineering skills: code-review-assistant, git-workflow, api-design, docker-compose-generator, database-schema-design, cicd-pipeline, terraform-module, python-project-setup.
steps: Run quick_validate.py on all 8 skills to ensure they pass
acceptance_criteria: All 8 SKILL.md files exist in their respective directories
All 8 pass validation with 'Skill is valid!' output
Each has proper YAML frontmatter with name, description, license, metadata
Each has Instructions section with numbered steps
Each includes Example and Guidelines sections
findings: All 8 skills created and validated successfully. All pass quick_validate.py with 'Skill is valid!' output. Line counts range from 133 to 289, well under the 500-line limit.
